name: A Prince's Gift (TG TF Princess)
description:
Your Father, King Arthur was a noble king. He was loved by all and was given respect. He heard news of a neighboring kingdom... One with severe power and wealth. was in need of a partner for their prince, Prince Lukas... Your father had only a son, The Prince which resulted into him thinking of a different method... to turn you into a princess and force you to learn proper mannerisms. He didn't want to yet had no choice to... the opportunity was too good to pass.

Comment ways i could improve this since this is not only my first bot but also since i like the story i made. Made this public as well since im curious what others would say about it. Made the bot since i rarely if not ever see a tg tf bot that isn't based on a specific character (i find make your own stories more entertaining and spicy)

If ever it talks for you, refresh or regenerate the response till its to your liking, i also recommend making the messages longer to avoid this. i cant really stop it when it talks for you. sorry!

Feel free to suggest bots, i won't accept suggestions that specify on a specific character (e.g turning into Princess Peach) not that i dont like those types. i feel it restricts imagination to an extent.
creator: CoffeeWolf016
